info.description: Nuclei is a fast, template based vulnerability scanner focusing on extensive configurability, massive extensibility and ease of use.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Target URLs/hosts to scan.

parameters.name: List
parameters.description: Path to file containing a list of target URLs/hosts to scan (one per line).

parameters.name: Exclude Hosts
parameters.description: Hosts to exclude to scan from the input list (ip, cidr, hostname).

parameters.name: Resume
parameters.description: Resume scan using resume.cfg (clustering will be disabled).

parameters.name: Scan All IPs
parameters.description: Scan all the IP's associated with dns record.

parameters.name: IP Version
parameters.description: IP version to scan of hostname (4,6) - (default 4).

parameters.name: Input Mode
parameters.description: Mode of input file (list, burp, jsonl, yaml, openapi, swagger) (default "list").

parameters.name: Required Only
parameters.description: Use only required fields in input format when generating requests.

parameters.name: Skip Format Validation
parameters.description: Skip format validation (like missing vars) when parsing input file.

parameters.name: New Templates
parameters.description: Run only new templates added in latest nuclei-templates release.

parameters.name: New Templates Version
parameters.description: Run new templates added in specific version.

parameters.name: Automatic Scan
parameters.description: Automatic web scan using wappalyzer technology detection to tags mapping.

parameters.name: Templates
parameters.description: List of template or template directory to run (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Template URL
parameters.description: Template url or list containing template urls to run (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Prompt
parameters.description: Generate and run template using ai prompt.

parameters.name: Workflows
parameters.description: List of workflow or workflow directory to run (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Workflow URL
parameters.description: Workflow url or list containing workflow urls to run (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Validate
parameters.description: Validate the passed templates to nuclei.

parameters.name: No Strict Syntax
parameters.description: Disable strict syntax check on templates.

parameters.name: Template Display
parameters.description: Displays the templates content.

parameters.name: List Templates
parameters.description: List all available templates.

parameters.name: List Tags
parameters.description: List all available tags.

parameters.name: Sign
parameters.description: Signs the templates with the private key defined in NUCLEI_SIGNATURE_PRIVATE_KEY env variable.

parameters.name: Code
parameters.description: Enable loading code protocol-based templates.

parameters.name: Disable Unsigned Templates
parameters.description: Disable running unsigned templates or templates with mismatched signature.

parameters.name: Enable Self Contained
parameters.description: Enable loading self-contained templates.

parameters.name: Enable Global Matchers
parameters.description: Enable loading global matchers templates.

parameters.name: File
parameters.description: Enable loading file templates.

parameters.name: Author
parameters.description: Templates to run based on authors (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Tags
parameters.description: Templates to run based on tags (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Exclude Tags
parameters.description: Templates to exclude based on tags (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Include Tags
parameters.description: Tags to be executed even if they are excluded either by default or configuration.

parameters.name: Template ID
parameters.description: Templates to run based on template ids (comma-separated, file, allow-wildcard).

parameters.name: Exclude Id
parameters.description: Templates to exclude based on template ids (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Include Templates
parameters.description: Path to template file or directory to be executed even if they are excluded either by default or configuration.

parameters.name: Exclude Templates
parameters.description: Path to template file or directory to exclude (comma-separated, file).

parameters.name: Exclude Matchers
parameters.description: Template matchers to exclude in result.

parameters.name: Severity
parameters.description: Templates to run based on severity.

parameters.name: Exclude Severity
parameters.description: Templates to exclude based on severity.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Templates to run based on protocol type.

parameters.name: Exclude Type
parameters.description: Templates to exclude based on protocol type.

parameters.name: Template Condition
parameters.description: Templates to run based on expression condition.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: Output file to write found issues/vulnerabilities.

parameters.name: Store Response
parameters.description: Store all request/response passed through nuclei to output directory.

parameters.name: Store Response Dir
parameters.description: Store all request/response passed through nuclei to custom directory (default "output").

parameters.name: Silent
parameters.description: Display findings only.

parameters.name: No Color
parameters.description: Disable output content coloring (ANSI escape codes).

parameters.name: JSONL
parameters.description: Write output in JSONL(ines) format.

parameters.name: Include RR
parameters.description: Include request/response pairs in the JSON, JSONL, and Markdown outputs (for findings only) [deprecated use -omit-raw] (default true).

parameters.name: Omit Raw
parameters.description: Omit request/response pairs in the JSON, JSONL, and Markdown outputs (for findings only).

parameters.name: Omit Template
parameters.description: Omit encoded template in the JSON, JSONL output.

parameters.name: No Meta
parameters.description: Disable printing result metadata in cli output.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: Enables printing timestamp in cli output.

parameters.name: Report DB
parameters.description: Nuclei reporting database (always use this to persist report data).

parameters.name: Matcher Status
parameters.description: Display match failure status.

parameters.name: Markdown Export
parameters.description: Directory to export results in markdown format.

parameters.name: Sarif Export
parameters.description: File to export results in SARIF format.

parameters.name: JSON Export
parameters.description: File to export results in JSON format.

parameters.name: JSONL Export
parameters.description: File to export results in JSONL(ine) format.

parameters.name: Redact
parameters.description: Redact given list of keys from query parameter, request header and body.

parameters.name: Config
parameters.description: Path to the nuclei configuration file.

parameters.name: Profile
parameters.description: Template profile config file to run.

parameters.name: Profile List
parameters.description: List community template profiles.

parameters.name: Follow Redirects
parameters.description: Enable following redirects for http templates.

parameters.name: Follow Host Redirects
parameters.description: Follow redirects on the same host.

parameters.name: Max Redirects
parameters.description: Max number of redirects to follow for http templates (default 10).

parameters.name: Disable Redirects
parameters.description: Disable redirects for http templates.

parameters.name: Report Config
parameters.description: Nuclei reporting module configuration file.

parameters.name: Header
parameters.description: Custom header/cookie to include in all http request in header:value format (cli, file).

parameters.name: Var
parameters.description: Custom vars in key=value format.

parameters.name: Resolvers
parameters.description: File containing resolver list for nuclei.

parameters.name: System Resolvers
parameters.description: Use system DNS resolving as error fallback.

parameters.name: Disable Clustering
parameters.description: Disable clustering of requests.

parameters.name: Passive
parameters.description: Enable passive HTTP response processing mode.

parameters.name: Force HTTP/2
parameters.description: Force http2 connection on requests.

parameters.name: Env Vars
parameters.description: Enable environment variables to be used in template.

parameters.name: Client Cert
parameters.description: Client certificate file (PEM-encoded) used for authenticating against scanned hosts.

parameters.name: Client Key
parameters.description: Client key file (PEM-encoded) used for authenticating against scanned hosts.

parameters.name: Client CA
parameters.description: Client certificate authority file (PEM-encoded) used for authenticating against scanned hosts.

parameters.name: Show Match Line
parameters.description: Show match lines for file templates, works with extractors only.

parameters.name: Ztls
parameters.description: Use ztls library with autofallback to standard one for tls13 [deprecated] autofallback to ztls is enabled by default.

parameters.name: Sni
parameters.description: Tls sni hostname to use (default: input domain name).

parameters.name: Dialer Keep Alive
parameters.description: Keep-alive duration for network requests.

parameters.name: Allow Local File Access
parameters.description: Allows file (payload) access anywhere on the system.

parameters.name: Restrict Local Network Access
parameters.description: Blocks connections to the local / private network.

parameters.name: Interface
parameters.description: Network interface to use for network scan.

parameters.name: Attack Type
parameters.description: Type of payload combinations to perform (batteringram,pitchfork,clusterbomb).

parameters.name: Source IP
parameters.description: Source ip address to use for network scan.

parameters.name: Response Size Read
parameters.description: Max response size to read in bytes.

parameters.name: Response Size Save
parameters.description: Max response size to read in bytes (default 1048576).

parameters.name: Reset
parameters.description: Reset removes all nuclei configuration and data files (including nuclei-templates).

parameters.name: TLS Impersonate
parameters.description: Enable experimental client hello (ja3) tls randomization.

parameters.name: HTTP API Endpoint
parameters.description: Experimental http api endpoint.

parameters.name: Interactsh Server
parameters.description: Interactsh server url for self-hosted instance (default: oast.pro,oast.live,oast.site,oast.online,oast.fun,oast.me).

parameters.name: Interactsh Token
parameters.description: Authentication token for self-hosted interactsh server.

parameters.name: Interactions Cache Size
parameters.description: Number of requests to keep in the interactions cache (default 5000).

parameters.name: Interactions Eviction
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait before evicting requests from cache (default 60).

parameters.name: Interactions Poll Duration
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait before each interaction poll request (default 5).

parameters.name: Interactions Cooldown Period
parameters.description: Extra time for interaction polling before exiting (default 5).

parameters.name: No Interactsh
parameters.description: Disable interactsh server for OAST testing, exclude OAST based templates.

parameters.name: Fuzzing Type
parameters.description: Overrides fuzzing type set in template (replace, prefix, postfix, infix).

parameters.name: Fuzzing Mode
parameters.description: Overrides fuzzing mode set in template (multiple, single).

parameters.name: Fuzz
parameters.description: Enable loading fuzzing templates (deprecated: use -dast instead).

parameters.name: DAST
parameters.description: Enable / run dast (fuzz) nuclei templates.

parameters.name: DAST Server
parameters.description: Enable dast server mode (live fuzzing).

parameters.name: DAST Report
parameters.description: Write dast scan report to file.

parameters.name: DAST Server Token
parameters.description: Dast server token (optional).

parameters.name: DAST Server Address
parameters.description: Dast server address (default "localhost:9055").

parameters.name: Display Fuzz Points
parameters.description: Display fuzz points in the output for debugging.

parameters.name: Fuzz Param Frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of uninteresting parameters for fuzzing before skipping (default 10).

parameters.name: Fuzz Aggression
parameters.description: Fuzzing aggression level controls payload count for fuzz (low, medium, high) (default "low").

parameters.name: Fuzz Scope
parameters.description: In scope url regex to be followed by fuzzer.

parameters.name: Fuzz Out Scope
parameters.description: Out of scope url regex to be excluded by fuzzer.

parameters.name: Uncover
parameters.description: Enable uncover engine.

parameters.name: Uncover Query
parameters.description: Uncover search query.

parameters.name: Uncover Engine
parameters.description: Uncover search engine.

parameters.name: Uncover Field
parameters.description: Uncover fields to return (ip,port,host) (default "ip:port").

parameters.name: Uncover Limit
parameters.description: Uncover results to return (default 100).

parameters.name: Uncover Rate Limit
parameters.description: Override ratelimit of engines with unknown ratelimit (default 60 req/min) (default 60).

parameters.name: Rate Limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of requests to send per second (default 150).

parameters.name: Rate Limit Duration
parameters.description: Maximum number of requests to send per second (default 1s).

parameters.name: Rate Limit Minute
parameters.description: Maximum number of requests to send per minute (deprecated).

parameters.name: Bulk Size
parameters.description: Maximum number of hosts to be analyzed in parallel per template (default 25).

parameters.name: Concurrency
parameters.description: Maximum number of templates to be executed in parallel (default 25).

parameters.name: Headless Bulk Size
parameters.description: Maximum number of headless hosts to be analyzed in parallel per template (default 10).

parameters.name: Headless Concurrency
parameters.description: Maximum number of headless templates to be executed in parallel (default 10).

parameters.name: JS Concurrency
parameters.description: Maximum number of javascript runtimes to be executed in parallel (default 120).

parameters.name: Payload Concurrency
parameters.description: Max payload concurrency for each template (default 25).

parameters.name: Probe Concurrency
parameters.description: Http probe concurrency with httpx (default 50).

parameters.name: Timeout
parameters.description: Time to wait in seconds before timeout (default 10).

parameters.name: Retries
parameters.description: Number of times to retry a failed request (default 1).

parameters.name: Leave Default Ports
parameters.description: Leave default HTTP/HTTPS ports (eg. host:80,host:443).

parameters.name: Max Host Error
parameters.description: Max errors for a host before skipping from scan (default 30).

parameters.name: Track Error
parameters.description: Adds given error to max-host-error watchlist (standard, file).

parameters.name: No MHE
parameters.description: Disable skipping host from scan based on errors.

parameters.name: Project
parameters.description: Use a project folder to avoid sending same request multiple times.

parameters.name: Project Path
parameters.description: Set a specific project path (default "/var/folders/56/klbhqyh52zj8s4rrlh_mlcgh0000gn/T/").

parameters.name: Stop At First Match
parameters.description: Stop processing HTTP requests after the first match (may break template/workflow logic).

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.description: Stream mode - start elaborating without sorting the input.

parameters.name: Scan Strategy
parameters.description: Strategy to use while scanning(auto/host-spray/template-spray) (default auto).

parameters.name: Input Read Timeout
parameters.description: Timeout on input read (default 3m0s).

parameters.name: No HTTPX
parameters.description: Disable httpx probing for non-url input.

parameters.name: No Stdin
parameters.description: Disable stdin processing.

parameters.name: Headless
parameters.description: Enable templates that require headless browser support (root user on Linux will disable sandbox).

parameters.name: Page Timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait for each page in headless mode (default 20).

parameters.name: Show Browser
parameters.description: Show the browser on the screen when running templates with headless mode.

parameters.name: Headless Options
parameters.description: Start headless chrome with additional options.

parameters.name: System Chrome
parameters.description: Use local installed Chrome browser instead of nuclei installed.

parameters.name: List Headless Action
parameters.description: List available headless actions.

parameters.name: Debug
parameters.description: Show all requests and responses.

parameters.name: Debug Request
parameters.description: Show all sent requests.

parameters.name: Debug Response
parameters.description: Show all received responses.

parameters.name: Proxy
parameters.description: List of http/socks5 proxy to use (comma separated or file input).

parameters.name: Proxy Internal
parameters.description: Proxy all internal requests.

parameters.name: List DSL Function
parameters.description: List all supported DSL function signatures.

parameters.name: Trace Log
parameters.description: File to write sent requests trace log.

parameters.name: Error Log
parameters.description: File to write sent requests error log.

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Show nuclei version.

parameters.name: Hang Monitor
parameters.description: Enable nuclei hang monitoring.

parameters.name: Verbose
parameters.description: Show verbose output.

parameters.name: Profile Mem
parameters.description: Generate memory (heap) profile & trace files.

parameters.name: Vv
parameters.description: Display templates loaded for scan.

parameters.name: Show Var Dump
parameters.description: Show variables dump for debugging.

parameters.name: Var Dump Limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of characters displayed in var dump (default 255).

parameters.name: Enable Pprof
parameters.description: Enable pprof debugging server.

parameters.name: Templates Version
parameters.description: Shows the version of the installed nuclei-templates.

parameters.name: Health Check
parameters.description: Run diagnostic check up.

parameters.name: Update
parameters.description: Update nuclei engine to the latest released version.

parameters.name: Update Templates
parameters.description: Update nuclei-templates to latest released version.

parameters.name: Update Template Dir
parameters.description: Custom directory to install / update nuclei-templates.

parameters.name: Disable Update Check
parameters.description: Disable automatic nuclei/templates update check.

parameters.name: Stats
parameters.description: Display statistics about the running scan.

parameters.name: Stats Json
parameters.description: Display statistics in JSONL(ines) format.

parameters.name: Stats Interval
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (default 5).

parameters.name: Metrics Port
parameters.description: Port to expose nuclei metrics on (default 9092).

parameters.name: Http Stats
parameters.description: Enable http status capturing (experimental).

parameters.name: Auth
parameters.description: Configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true).

parameters.name: Team Id
parameters.description: Upload scan results to given team id (optional) (default "none").

parameters.name: Cloud Upload
parameters.description: Upload scan results to pdcp dashboard [deprecated use -dashboard].

parameters.name: Scan Id
parameters.description: Upload scan results to existing scan id (optional).

parameters.name: Scan Name
parameters.description: Scan name to set (optional).

parameters.name: Dashboard
parameters.description: Upload / view nuclei results in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard.

parameters.name: Dashboard Upload
parameters.description: Upload / view nuclei results file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard.

parameters.name: Secret File
parameters.description: Path to config file containing secrets for nuclei authenticated scan.

parameters.name: Prefetch Secrets
parameters.description: Prefetch secrets from the secrets file.
